_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from AGM sources — unanalysed

items.title: White House releases National Policy Framework for AI on March 20
items.summary: The framework states Congress should avoid new federal AI rulemaking bodies and support sector-specific standards, aiming to pre-empt state-level regulation. Relevant to AI regulatory developments as it shapes US federal AI policy.
items.domain_relevance: US AI regulatory developments, federal pre-emption of state action

items.title: Anthropic refuses updated Pentagon partnership over surveillance, weapons
items.summary: Anthropic rejected a government agreement expanding use to 'anything legal' without bans on mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, backed by OpenAI. Highlights corporate governance of high-stakes AI in defense.
items.domain_relevance: Frontier AI safety, AI governance in military applications

items.title: Singapore releases updated Model AI Governance Framework for Agentic AI
items.summary: The 2026 framework addresses risks of agentic AI with assessments, human accountability, safeguards, and user responsibility guidelines. Advances global AI governance for autonomous systems.
items.domain_relevance: AI regulatory developments, agentic AI governance

items.title: U.S. Treasury releases AI risk management guidance for financial institutions
items.summary: Guidance covers model governance, data security, and consumer protection for AI in finance. Signals rising regulatory focus on safe AI in financial services.

items.title: European Commission outlines AI Act compliance for high-risk systems
items.summary: Commission details expectations for explainability, auditing, and risk classification in finance, healthcare, infrastructure. Prepares companies for EU AI Act enforcement.
items.domain_relevance: EU AI Act enforcement, high-risk AI compliance

items.title: NIST releases AI 600-1 Generative AI Profile
items.summary: New profile addresses generative AI risks like bias, transparency, privacy not covered in prior frameworks. Provides guidance for responsible AI design.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance frameworks for generative AI

items.title: Serious Insights publishes State of AI 2026 March Update
items.summary: Update covers shadow AI risks, US federal framework pre-empting states, Anthropic-Pentagon dispute. Analyzes governance challenges in AI deployment.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance trends, shadow AI, regulatory updates

items.title: Dwealth.news releases AI Intelligence Weekly Top 10 for March 20-26
items.summary: Weekly roundup highlights AI infrastructure investments, enterprise competition, US Treasury and EU Commission regulatory advances. Tracks key AI governance signals.

items.title: P3 Adaptive publishes 10 Key AI Governance Frameworks in 2026
items.summary: Lists NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, Singapore agentic AI framework, others with 2026 updates. Documents evolving global AI governance standards.

items.title: Atlan releases 7 Top AI Governance Tools for 2026 roundup
items.summary: Highlights Atlan, Holistic AI, IBM Watsonx.governance, Credo AI, others with EU AI Act compliance features. Showcases tools for AI risk management.
items.domain_relevance: AI governance tools, EU AI Act compliance
